event.description:
Our city is welcoming the [GraphQL Conference](https://graphql.org/conf/)!

We gather the local community at not one, but two amazing meetups. Pick one based on what technocal content you want to see and learn about.

The [GraphQL SF #12: Generative AI Night hosted at GitHub](https://www.meetup.com/graphql-sf/events/295804141/) is hosted by GitHub and the topics is the AI for UX.

And [GraphQL SF Meetup: September Edition](https://www.meetup.com/sf-graphql/events/296063389/), colocated with the conference, features several talks, from federated API, to web3, to Rust full-stack GraphQL solutions.

If you like GraphQL as middleware, make sure to attend [Scale By the Bay](https://scale.bythebay.io), the main independent conference of Bay Area meetups, that pioneered GraphQL middleware in 2016.
event.title: GraphQLConf Meetups!
